subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for reaching out. We’d be happy to set up a brief meeting to explore potential collaboration. I can առաջարկ the following windows: 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each from 14:00–16:00 UTC. Let me know which time works best.

I can’t share internal direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering. For general company information, please refer to our public website.

Best,
[Your Name]
